description: The team rushes the injured Deke onto Zephyr One. Daisy struggles to stabilize him with May and Coulson's help, realizing they're in a dire medical situation. Daisy asks for Simmons via comms, but there's no answer. They race toward the Lighthouse for help.
location: Zephyr One (S.H.I.E.L.D. quinjet / mobile command plane)

transcript.line: Get this plane in the air. We got you.
I can't stop the bleeding. Grab the hemostatic granules. It's okay.
This is only a temporary fix. He's gonna need actual medical attention.
Call ahead to Simmons. Give her a heads-up.
No one's answering. Can you hold on until we make it to the Lighthouse?
Just get us there as fast as you can.
